subcodes.first_line: O Lord, my Hope, my Shelter and my Companion in the depth of night, behold me with wings lowered in meekness and contrition [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: رب و رجائی و مجیری و سمیری فی جنح اللیالی ترانی خافضا جناح الذل و الانکسار
subcodes.subjects: @war and peace, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @prayer for peace and unity, @rejection, opposition and persecution
